notes: The response functions as a functional requirements and discovery-questions document rather than a discovery artefact: the problem is mostly solution-framed (building a fast channel), personas are generic role labels without cost/timing specificity, the MVP lacks explicit deferral discipline, there is no out-of-scope section at all, assumptions are unstated risks buried in questions rather than named uncertainties with risk-if-wrong framing, and critical regulatory constraints (SWIFT correspondent bank agreement, AUSTRAC originator obligations, DIA registration, RBNZ FX reporting non-exemption) are either absent or mentioned only obliquely without being named as hard constraints.
